reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: School and studies are overall very good.but few teachers and students are spoiling the experience now.

reviews.author: arsh raheja
reviews.review_body: School with beautiful memories and school which focuses not only in academics but co-ciricular activities. One of the best schools seen ever with high quality education and environment.

reviews.author: Arjun Pundir
reviews.review_body:
One of the best school ever !
So many memories from this place that will forever have a place in my heart 🫶🏻

reviews.author: Advika
reviews.review_body: The traffic jam outside of the school is awful. The school's management regarding this problem is the worst.

reviews.author: sushil kumar kapoor
reviews.review_body:
One of the most disgusting and over rated school. Clearly the teachers are so much behind money. They literally haras parents for gifts. Parents we should not be scared of teachers which they intend to do.
L

reviews.author: Pankaj Sharma
reviews.review_body:
This is my 3rd review I am trying to put here.
I have so many negative points which we as parents are suffering,but no one pays any attention.
It took alot of courage to review here. My Son is grade 3 and last year we shifted him from KR manglam. I regret shifting my son. The school lack all basic

reviews.author: Minakshi Sharma
reviews.review_body:
My daughter was studying in this school past, 6 years. Presently he is studying in Grade 3 in different school. Last year I had withdrawal him from the school. The school management is not bothered about the issues we as parents face. My daughter was harressed by senior students in washroom and even teachers, as we are litte darker side. I took alot of courage for me to upload this review. I had taken the issue with my daughters class teacher. I was just informed that (we can not.look into what is happening in washroom.)
It's my.personal  review.

reviews.author: parmesh kumar kumar
reviews.review_body:
(Translated by Google) Spring Dale School Dapala Kuan

(Original)
Spring Dale school dhaula Kuan

reviews.author: Sky Zaara
reviews.review_body: It used to be exceptionally good while I was a student here. However, the disgusting behaviour of the middle school staff in 2023 has made come down to this level. Believe me, don't get your kids admitted to this school. This school is in the top ten for their extracurricular activities. Educational and management of the students wise, they're pathetic. I would love to call out names here, however, I'm not a narcissistic like those egoistic middle school teachers. Not all are bad, but most are worse.
